item.title: Marketing Automation Fundamentals
item.description: Comprehensive training on marketing automation fundamentals covering strategy, setup, and optimization across multiple platforms.

item.title: Content Factory Membership
item.description: Monthly membership providing templates, blueprints, training videos, and community access to scale your content marketing efforts.
